zh.lifeSummary: William Lumpkin是Lumpkin的兒子，於大約1600年出生在英國艾可。他於1623年與Thomasine在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯結婚。他們至少是6個女兒的父母。他在美國麻薩諸塞州巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯被列為constable。他去世於1671年1月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯享年72歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼亞爾姆斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: William Lumpkin是Lumpkin的儿子，于大约1600年出生在英国艾可。他于1623年与Thomasine在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯结婚。他们至少是6个女儿的父母。他在美国马萨诸塞州巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯被列为constable。他去世于1671年1月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波亞爾姆斯享年72岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼亞爾姆斯。

nameMeanings.name: Lumpkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from a pet form of   Lamb   1 and 2.

variants.name: Lamb
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Lamb, a pet form of Lambert .
English: nickname for a meek and inoffensive person, from Middle English lamb, or a metonymic occupational name for a keeper of lambs. See also Lamm .

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luain ‘descendant of the warrior’, formerly Anglicized as O'Loan (see Lane 3). MacLysaght comments: "The form Lamb(e), which results from a more than usually absurd pseudo-translation (uan ‘lamb’), is now much more numerous than O'Loan itself.".

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.description: In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: William Lumpkin was born about 1600, in Essex, England as the son of Lumpkin. He married Thomasine in 1623, in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 6 daughters. His occupation is listed as constable in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts, United States. He died on 25 January 1671, in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 72, and was buried in Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: William Lumpkin est né environ 1600, à Essex, Angleterre, fils de Lumpkin. Il a épousé Thomasine en 1623, à Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 6 filles. Sa profession de son indiquée est constable à Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 25 janvier 1671, à Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 72 ans, et a été enterré à Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: William Lumpkin wurde um 1600 in Essex, England, als Sohn von Lumpkin geboren. Er hat 1623 in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Thomasine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Töchter. sein Beruf ist als constable in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. Januar 1671 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: William Lumpkin è nato il circa 1600 nel Essex, England come figlio di Lumpkin. Lui sposato Thomasine nel 1623, nel Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figlie. La sua occupazione è indicata come constable nel Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 25 gennaio 1671, nel Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 72 anni, e fu sepolto a Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーヤーモウス
ja.lifeSummary: William Lumpkinは約1600年にイギリスエセックスでLumpkinの息子として生まれた。1623年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルヤーモウスでThomasineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の娘の親であった。アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州バーンスタブルヤーモウスでの職業はconstableと記録されている。彼は1671年1月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルヤーモウスで72歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーヤーモウスにて埋葬された。

ko.Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colon: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 야모우스
ko.lifeSummary: William Lumpkin(은)는 대략 1600년 영국 에세스에서 Lumpkin의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1623년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 야모우스에서 Thomasine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그의 직업은 미국 매사추세츠 주 바른스타블일 야모우스에서 constable이었다. 그는 1671년 1월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 야모우스에서 72세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 야모우스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: William Lumpkin nasceu aproximadamente 1600, em Essex, Inglaterra filho de Lumpkin. Ele casou-se com Thomasine em 1623, em Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhas. Sua profissão aparece como constable em Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1671, em Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 72 anos, e foi sepultado em Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: William Lumpkin родился около 1600 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. Его отца звали Lumpkin. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasine в 1623 г. в местности ярмоут, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 6 дочерей.  Он работал по профессии constable в местности ярмоут, барнстабл, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 25 января 1671 г. в местности ярмоут, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 72 лет и был похоронен в местности ярмоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: William Lumpkin nació aproximadamente 1600, en Essex, Inglaterra como hijo de Lumpkin. Se casó con Thomasine en 1623, en Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijas. Su ocupación registrada era constable en Yarmouth, Barnstable, Masachusets, Estados Unidos. Murió el 25 de enero de 1671, en Yarmouth, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 72 años, y fue sepultado en Yarmouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.
